# CLAUDE.md
# Auto-generated by Copilot Agent | Repo: Krosebrook/interact
# Last updated: 2026-03-15

## Project Overview
Interact is an enterprise-grade employee engagement and gamification platform that transforms
workplace culture through points, badges, leaderboards, AI-powered personalization, and
seamless team activity management. Built for organizations wanting to improve retention and
team cohesion, it is currently in active development (v0.0.0) transitioning from MVP to
production-ready.

## Stack
- **Language:** JavaScript (JSX) — TypeScript migration planned Q2 2025
- **Framework:** React 18.2.0
- **Build Tool:** Vite 6.1.0
- **Runtime:** Browser (SPA) + Deno (serverless backend functions via Base44 SDK)
- **Backend:** Base44 SDK 0.8.20 (serverless TypeScript functions in `functions/`)
- **Database/ORM:** Base44 managed database (entities accessed via `base44.entities.*`)
- **Auth:** Base44 Auth (`base44.auth.me()`) + `AuthContext` in `src/lib/AuthContext.jsx`
- **Styling:** TailwindCSS 3.4.17 + Radix UI primitives
- **State:** React Context API + TanStack Query 5.84.1
- **Forms:** React Hook Form 7.54.2 + Zod 3.24.2
- **Animations:** Framer Motion 11.16.4
- **Testing:** Vitest 4.0.17 + React Testing Library
- **CI/CD:** GitHub Actions (`.github/workflows/ci.yml`) → Vercel

## Architecture
Browser SPA (React/Vite) → Base44 SDK client (`src/api/base44Client.js`) → Base44 managed
backend → entity store + serverless functions. The 200 TypeScript functions in `functions/`
run on Deno and handle business logic, AI integrations (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini), Stripe
webhooks, notifications, and analytics aggregation. External AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic,
Google) and 3rd-party services (Slack, Teams, Google Calendar, HubSpot, Cloudinary, Stripe,
Twilio) are called exclusively from backend functions using environment secrets. TanStack Query
manages all server-state caching on the frontend.

## Key Directories
```
src/
  App.jsx               — Root component, router setup, provider composition
  Layout.jsx            — App shell (nav, sidebar, auth guard)
  main.jsx              — Vite entry point
  pages.config.js       — Lazy-loaded page map (127 pages)
  pages/                — 127 route-level page components
  components/           — 64 feature sub-directories of UI components
    ui/                 — Radix UI / shadcn primitives
    common/             — Shared utility components (ErrorBoundary, PageHeader, …)
    admin/              — Admin dashboard components
    ai/                 — AI-powered feature components
    analytics/          — Charts and dashboard components
    gamification/       — Points, badges, leaderboards, challenges
    auth/               — Login, registration, RBAC guards
    docs/               — Auto-generated in-app documentation (excluded from lint)
  api/
    base44Client.js     — Configured Base44 SDK client
  lib/
    AuthContext.jsx     — Global auth context + useAuth hook
    query-client.js     — TanStack Query client config
    utils.js            — cn() and common helpers
    imageUtils.js       — Cloudinary URL optimization
    integrationsRegistry.js — Third-party integration registry
    app-params.js       — URL/env param resolution (VITE_BASE44_APP_ID, etc.)
  hooks/                — Custom React hooks
  utils/                — Pure utility functions
  test/                 — Test setup, shared fixtures, unit tests
functions/              — 200 Deno/Base44 serverless functions (TypeScript)
docs/                   — Planning, audits, ADRs, feature guides
scripts/                — CLI scripts (PRD generation, etc.)
ADR/                    — Architecture Decision Records
.github/workflows/      — CI/CD pipeline definitions
```

## Environment Variables
All secrets via environment variables — never hardcode.

### Frontend (Vite — `VITE_` prefix, exposed to browser)
| Variable | Required | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `VITE_BASE44_APP_ID` | ✅ | Base44 application identifier |
| `VITE_BASE44_BACKEND_URL` | ✅ | Base44 backend URL |
| `VITE_BASE44_API_URL` | ✅ | Base44 API URL |
| `VITE_COMPANY_ID` | Optional | Company identifier |
| `VITE_ENABLE_ANALYTICS` | Optional | Enable analytics feature flag |
| `VITE_ENABLE_PWA` | Optional | Enable PWA feature flag |
| `VITE_ENABLE_DARK_MODE` | Optional | Enable dark mode toggle |
| `VITE_DARK_MODE_DEFAULT` | Optional | Default dark mode state |
| `VITE_GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_ID` | Optional | GA4 measurement ID |
| `VITE_ANALYTICS_ID` | Optional | Analytics platform ID |
| `VITE_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY` | Optional | Stripe public key |
| `VITE_USERS` | Optional | Dev-only test user list |
| `VITE_SENTRY_DSN` | Optional | Sentry error tracking DSN |

### Backend (Deno functions — configure in Base44 dashboard / secrets manager)
| Variable | Required | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `OPENAI_API_KEY` | ✅ (AI features) | OpenAI GPT-4 |
| `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` | ✅ (AI features) | Claude 3 |
| `GOOGLE_API_KEY` | Optional | Gemini Pro |
| `PERPLEXITY_API_KEY` | Optional | Perplexity search |
| `ELEVENLABS_API_KEY` | Optional | Text-to-speech |
| `SENDGRID_API_KEY` | Optional | Email notifications |
| `RESEND_API_KEY` | Optional | Email alternative |
| `CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME` | Optional | Media storage |
| `CLOUDINARY_API_KEY` | Optional | Media storage |
| `CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET` | Optional | Media storage |
| `CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID` | Optional | Cloudflare integration |
| `STRIPE_SECRET_KEY` | Optional | Payments |
| `STRIPE_SIGNING_SECRET` | Optional | Stripe webhooks |
| `TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID` | Optional | SMS notifications |
| `TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN` | Optional | SMS notifications |
| `SLACK_BOT_TOKEN` | Optional | Slack integration |
| `SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL` | Optional | Slack webhooks |
| `TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL` | Optional | Teams integration |
| `NOTION_API_KEY` | Optional | Notion integration |
| `HUBSPOT_API_KEY` | Optional | HubSpot CRM |
| `GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN` | Optional | GitHub integration |
| `VERCEL_TOKEN` | Optional | Vercel deployment |
| `APP_URL` | Optional | Application base URL |

## Development Commands
```bash
# Install dependencies
npm ci

# Run development server
npm run dev

# Run tests (watch mode)
npm test

# Run tests (single pass — used in CI)
npm run test:run

# Run tests with coverage report
npm run test:coverage

# Lint (check)
npm run lint

# Lint (auto-fix)
npm run lint:fix

# TypeScript type check
npm run typecheck

# Build for production
npm run build

# Preview production build locally
npm run preview

# Generate PRD
npm run prd:generate
```

## Conventions

### File Naming
- **Pages:** PascalCase (`ActivityCard.jsx`, `Dashboard.jsx`)
- **Hooks:** camelCase with `use` prefix (`use-mobile.jsx`, `useServiceLayer.ts`)
- **Utilities:** camelCase (`imageUtils.js`, `app-params.js`)
- **Test files:** Same name + `.test.js/.test.jsx` (mirrored alongside source)
- **Backend functions:** camelCase (`awardBadgeForActivity.ts`, `generatePersonalizedRecommendations.ts`)

### Component Structure
Functional components using hooks. Order: imports → constants → hooks (all at top level,
never conditional) → event handlers → return JSX.

```javascript
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

export default function ComponentName({ prop1, className }) {
  const [state, setState] = useState(null);

  useEffect(() => { /* side effects */ }, [dependencies]);

  const handleAction = async () => {
    try {
      toast.success('Done');
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error('Something went wrong');
    }
  };

  return <div className={cn('p-4', className)}>{/* JSX */}</div>;
}
```

### API / Data Fetching
Use TanStack Query for all server state. Query keys are hierarchical arrays. `staleTime`
default: 5 minutes. All mutations call `queryClient.invalidateQueries` on success.

```javascript
import { useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query';
import { base44 } from '@/api/base44Client';

const { data, isLoading } = useQuery({
  queryKey: ['activities'],
  queryFn: () => base44.entities.Activity.list(),
  staleTime: 5 * 60 * 1000,
});
```

### Error Handling
Wrap async operations in `try/catch`. Show generic toast to user, log details internally.
Error boundaries wrap the root app and all lazy-loaded pages.

### Async Pattern
Prefer `async/await` throughout. Avoid mixing `.then()/.catch()` callbacks with `await`.

### Backend Function Pattern (Deno)
```typescript
import { createClientFromRequest } from 'npm:@base44/sdk@0.8.6';
Deno.serve(async (req) => {
  try {
    const base44 = createClientFromRequest(req);
    const user = await base44.auth.me();
    if (!user) return Response.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 });
    // validate inputs, business logic
    return Response.json({ success: true, data: result });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Function error:', error);
    return Response.json({ error: 'Internal server error' }, { status: 500 });
  }
});
```

## Security Notes
- **Auth model:** Base44 Auth — JWT-based, checked via `base44.auth.me()` in every function
- **Secrets:** All via environment variables — never commit credentials
- **XSS:** React escapes by default; use DOMPurify before `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`
- **Input validation:** Zod schemas on frontend forms; validate all inputs in backend functions
- **RBAC:** Role checks in backend functions; admin-only routes guarded by `ProtectedRoute`
- **Sensitive data:** Strip sensitive fields before API responses; log details internally only
- **npm audit:** Run `npm audit` before each release — address high/critical issues

## Agent Instructions (for Copilot / Claude Code)
- Always run `npm run lint` before committing — must exit with code 0 (no errors)
- Always run `npm run test:run` before marking a task complete
- Do NOT modify: `src/components/docs/**`, `src/components/lib/architecture/**`, `**/*.ts.jsx`, `**/*.md.jsx` (auto-generated/hybrid files excluded from linting)
- Match component patterns from: `src/components/activities/ActivityCard.jsx`, `src/components/common/ErrorBoundary.jsx`
- Match backend function patterns from: `functions/awardBadgeForActivity.ts`, `functions/generatePersonalizedRecommendations.ts`
- New npm dependencies require explicit user approval
- All secrets via environment variables only — never hardcode
- Use `cn()` from `@/lib/utils` for conditional TailwindCSS classes
- Hooks MUST be called at the top level of components — never conditionally
- Use `date-fns` for date formatting — NOT `moment.js`
- ESLint: `unused-imports/no-unused-imports` is an error (CI-blocking) — auto-fix with `npm run lint:fix`
